doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document presents specific EDPB metadata and definitive legal conclusions that cannot be verified as real EDPB guidance and contain implausible legal assertions about being “outside the material scope” of GDPR.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 78  
REASON: The document’s specific identifiers and claims (e.g., “EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026” with a 22 March 2026 adoption and sweeping conclusions that non-holders are “outside the material scope” of GDPR Article 2(1)) are not verifiable as genuine EDPB output and contain legally implausible guidance.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED

REASON: The document presents specific EDPB metadata and definitive legal conclusions that cannot be verified as real EDPB guidance and contain implausible legal assertions about being “outside the material scope” of GDPR.
